{{Infobox construct
| name = Burrow Guardian
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Burrow Guardians are elite commandos summoned through magic. They are characterized as high-level rabbit entities, often referred to as [[Voidhoppers]], who possess the ability to move in and out of [[Subspace]] to stall opponents. These summons are shaped by a combination of the natural defensive instincts of rabbits—specifically their tendency to use warrens to shield their young—and human concepts of guardianship, resulting in soldiers that resemble the power-armored troops of the [[Galactic Union]]. In combat, they utilize advanced technology including power armor equipped with ocular scanners, floating support drones, and automatic plasma rifles or chaos rifles. They are capable of providing effective cover fire and can even divide themselves into multiple forms to create tactical advantages.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Burrow Guardians are elite commandos that wear power armor with a scanner over one eye and a support drone.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Burrow Guardian]] is a character that glares at [[Mell]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Burrow Guardians are summons that draw from the rabbit's defensive mindset.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Burrow Guardians are entities clad in power armor that use chaos rifles and guided combat drones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Burrow Guardians provide cover fire for the narrator.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
